---
title: Blog Index
listing:
    contents: posts/**/*.qmd
    date-format: ddd, MMMM DD, YYYY
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: numbered
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
    feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

---
